name: Surprise Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
2. Stir in the grits and continue to cook until thickened.
3. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the sugar and butter/margarine.
5. Gradually add about one-fourth of the hot mixture to the beaten eggs, stirring constantly.
6. Add the egg mixture to the remaining hot mixture, stirring constantly.
7. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens and reaches 160°F (about 8 minutes).
8. Stir in the flaked coconut and sour cream.
9. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
10. Cover and chill.
11. Garnish with whipped cream and sweetened, as desired. Makes one 9-inch pie.
